topic: Determination of Forward and Futures Prices
title: Valuing Forward Contracts: Calculate the future value when investing 5000 at a 0.05...
summary: Analyze the mechanics and characteristics of futures contracts.
prompt: Calculate the future value when investing $5,000 at a 5% interest rate compounded annually for 5 years.
solution: The future value (FV) can be calculated using the formula FV = PV(1 + r)^n, where PV is the present value, r is the interest rate, and n is the number of periods. So, FV = 5000(1 + 0.05)^5 = $6,382.26.
